*Content was generated by ChatGPT*

*Reference: https://github.com/openai/openai-cookbook/blob/main/examples/How_to_handle_rate_limits.ipynb*
*Reference: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/rate-limits/overview*

OpenAI's rate limits are like speed limits for how quickly you can send requests to their AI models. When you're using OpenAI's services, there are certain limits on how many requests you can make within a specific period of time.

Think of it like driving on a road with a speed limit. You can't drive too fast because there's a rule that keeps you from going too speedy, ensuring safety for you and others on the road. Similarly, OpenAI's rate limits help ensure that their systems are used responsibly and don't get overloaded.

These limits might be set to a certain number of requests per minute, hour, or day, depending on the specific service or plan you're using. Exceeding these limits could lead to temporary restrictions on your access or usage.

Rate limits are in place to maintain the quality and availability of the AI services for everyone, preventing any one user from using up too much of the system's resources and making sure everyone gets a fair share of the service.

### Solution

> Install package:

```sh
pip install openai
pip install tenacity
```

> Set OpenAI API token

```py
import os
os.environ['OPENAI_API_KEY'] = 'YOUR OPENAI API TOKEN'
```

> Call ChatCompletion 100 times

```py
import openai  # for making OpenAI API requests

# request a bunch of completions in a loop
for _ in range(100):
    openai.ChatCompletion.create(
        model="gpt-3.5-turbo",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello"}],
        max_tokens=10,
    )
```

> Output:

```
RateLimitError: Rate limit reached for default-gpt-3.5-turbo in organization org-ndjncv7yEFcWAfiSou6jSEns on requests per min. Limit: 3 / min. Please try again in 20s. Contact us through our help center at help.openai.com if you continue to have issues. Please add a payment method to your account to increase your rate limit. Visit https://platform.openai.com/account/billing to add a payment method.
```

> Backoff method wih tenacity

```py
import openai  # for OpenAI API calls
from tenacity import (
    retry,
    stop_after_attempt,
    wait_random_exponential,
)  # for exponential backoff


@retry(wait=wait_random_exponential(min=1, max=60), stop=stop_after_attempt(6))
def completion_with_backoff(**kwargs):
    return openai.Completion.create(**kwargs)


completion_with_backoff(model="text-davinci-002", prompt="Once upon a time,")
```

> Output:

```
<OpenAIObject text_completion id=cmpl-7jHF2sh1IdbZWjHtp8LoqZzRWSIIs at 0x7f153397f2e0> JSON: {
  "id": "cmpl-7jHF2sh1IdbZWjHtp8LoqZzRWSIIs",
  "object": "text_completion",
  "created": 1691025392,
  "model": "text-davinci-002",
  "choices": [
    {
      "text": " there was a mermaid who heard a little boy crying near the ocean. She",
      "index": 0,
      "logprobs": null,
      "finish_reason": "length"
    }
  ],
  "usage": {
    "prompt_tokens": 5,
    "completion_tokens": 16,
    "total_tokens": 21
  }
}
```
